zh.Bray Hundred, Berkshire, England: 英國波克夏布雷 崔德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Norreys於大約1400年出生在英國波克夏布雷時，他的父親Sir William Norreys Esq of  Ockwells26歲，母親Lady Christina Strech19歲。他於1425年與Lady Alice Merbrooke在英國波克夏布雷結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1466年9月1日在英國波克夏亞頓登享年67歲，埋葬在英國波克夏布雷。

zh-hans.Bray Hundred, Berkshire, England: 英国波克夏布雷 崔德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Norreys于大约1400年出生在英国波克夏布雷时，他的父亲Sir William Norreys Esq of  Ockwells26岁，母亲Lady Christina Strech19岁。他于1425年与Lady Alice Merbrooke在英国波克夏布雷结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1466年9月1日在英国波克夏亞頓登享年67岁，埋葬在英国波克夏布雷。

nameMeanings.name: Norreys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Norris
meanings: habitational name from Middle English norreis, noreis, norais ‘northerner’ (Anglo-Norman French noreis), used both of Norwegians and of inhabitants of northern England and Scotland.
from the Middle English personal name Norreis, derived from norreis ‘northerner’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Norreys was born about 1400, in Bray, Berkshire, England, his father, Sir William Norreys Esq of  Ockwells, was 26 and his mother, Lady Christina Strech, was 19. He married Lady Alice Merbrooke in 1425, in Bray, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 1 September 1466, in Yattendon, Berkshire, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Bray, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Norreys est né environ 1400, à Bray, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Norreys Esq of  Ockwells, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Christina Strech, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice Merbrooke en 1425, à Bray, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 1 septembre 1466, à Yattendon, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Bray, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Norreys um 1400 in Bray, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Norreys Esq of  Ockwells 26 und seine Mutter Lady Christina Strech 19. Er hat 1425 in Bray, Berkshire, England Lady Alice Merbrooke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 1. September 1466 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Yattendon, Berkshire, England und wurde in Bray, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Norreys è nato il circa 1400 nel Bray, Berkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Norreys Esq of  Ockwells, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Lady Christina Strech, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alice Merbrooke nel 1425, nel Bray, Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 settembre 1466, nel Yattendon, Berkshire, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Bray, Berkshire, England.

ja.Yattendon, Berkshire, England: イギリスバークシュアイアヤッテンドン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Norreysが約1400年にイギリスバークシュアイアブレイで生まれた時，父Sir William Norreys Esq of  Ockwellsは26歳，母Lady Christina Strechは19歳であった。1425年にイギリスバークシュアイアブレイでLady Alice Merbrookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1466年9月1日にイギリスバークシュアイアヤッテンドンで67歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアブレイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Norreys(이)가 대략 1400년 영국 버크실르 브라이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Norreys Esq of  Ockwells(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Christina Strech(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1425년 영국 버크실르 브라이에서 Lady Alice Merbrooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1466년 9월 1일 영국 버크실르 야텐던에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 브라이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Norreys nasceu aproximadamente 1400, em Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Norreys Esq of  Ockwells, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Christina Strech, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alice Merbrooke em 1425, em Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de setembro de 1466, em Yattendon, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Norreys родился около 1400 г. в местности брэи, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Norreys Esq of  Ockwells было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Christina Strech, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice Merbrooke в 1425 г. в местности брэи, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 1 сентября 1466 г. в местности яттендон, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности брэи, биркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Norreys nació aproximadamente 1400, en Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Norreys Esq of  Ockwells, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Christina Strech, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Lady Alice Merbrooke en 1425, en Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de septiembre de 1466, en Yattendon, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
